title: LangChain Basics
text: LangChain is a framework for building LLM applications with chains, agents, and retrieval workflows.

title: LangChain and FAISS
text: LangChain often uses FAISS as a vector index backend for document retrieval and similarity search.

title: FAISS Overview
text: FAISS is Facebook's library for efficient similarity search over dense vectors.

title: RAG Grounding
text: RAG reduces hallucination by grounding model responses in retrieved documents.

title: Transformers Primer
text: Transformers use self-attention mechanisms for sequence modeling and modern NLP tasks.

title: GraphRAG Note
text: GraphRAG combines knowledge graphs with retrieval so relationship questions can follow explicit entity links.

title: RAPTOR Note
text: RAPTOR builds hierarchical summaries over document clusters so retrieval can happen at different abstraction levels.

title: CRAG Note
text: CRAG evaluates retrieval quality, refines ambiguous queries, and falls back when knowledge is missing.
